title: Privacy Glass & more
description: Glass Block that can be turned non-seethrough
body:
# 🪟 Privacy Glass – Control Transparency Like Never Before!

### Bring new functionality into your Minecraft world with Privacy Glass!

This innovative mod introduces a new type of glass block that can switch between transparent and opaque states at your command. Perfect for base security, hidden rooms, or stylish architecture, the glass blends seamlessly into any build — until you decide it’s time to hide what’s behind it.

### ✨ Key Features

🔒 Toggle Transparency — Make your glass instantly opaque by right clicking it.

🏠 Perfect for house windows & hidden bases — Enjoy privacy at the flip of a switch!

Whether you’re designing curtains for a cabin, a secret laboratory, or a hidden bunker,  Privacy Glass adds a futuristic touch and a new layer of immersion to your Minecraft world
